title: Reed Richards (Earth-121698)
content:

| Quotation               = No, [[T. Hager (Earth-121698)|you]]'re right. I didn't. I stayed in and studied like a good little nerd. And fifteen years later, I'm one of the greatest minds of the 21st century; I'm engaged to the [[Susan Storm (Earth-121698)|hottest girl]] on the planet; and [[T. Hager (Earth-121698)|the big jock]] who played quarterback in high school? He's standing in front of me asking for my help. And I say he's not gonna get a damn thing, unless he does exactly what I tell him, and starts treating me and [[Fantastic Four (Earth-121698)|my friends]] with a little respect.
| Speaker                 = [[Reed Richards (Earth-121698)|Mr. Fantastic]]
| QuoteSource             = Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (film)

| History                 = Reed Richards, also known as Mr. Fantastic, is a member of the [[Fantastic Four (Earth-121698)|Fantastic Four]]. Brilliant mathematician and physicist, Reed Richards is a humble genius and gifted idealist. 

Reed always reached for the stars and would have done anything to fund his lifelong dream of an experimental space mission - including cutting a last-ditch, no-win deal with [[Victor von Doom (Earth-121698)|Victor von Doom]]. But one tiny miscalculation turned into tragedy when a brutal cosmic storm battered the spaceship and its crew. The cosmic rays left Reed the ability to bend, stretch and expand his body in any imaginable way. Reed himself responsible for the accident which transformed the Four, and he wrapped himself around his work to reverse their condition.

When Reed's best friend, [[Benjamin Grimm (Earth-121698)|Ben Grimm]], brought himself to the top of a bridge, he noticed a man attempting to commit suicide and tried to stop him but in doing so caused chaos to happen on the bridge. This caused Reed and the others to put their powers to good use and save the citizens from harm's way. Because of their heroism, the team had been given a new name by the media: The Fantastic Four.

The exposure to the cosmic cloud brought out the worst in Victor Von Doom. He turned Ben against Reed, convincing him that Reed was responsible for Ben's hideous appearance. Reed had witnessed Victor harming Ben and attempted to stop him before getting kidnapped and put under a super-cooling unit to prevent him from stretching. He was later freed after Ben realized that Victor was out to ruin Reed and united with his friends to stop him. Reed Richards, [[Susan Storm (Earth-121698)|Sue Storm]], [[Jonathan Storm (Earth-121698)|Johnny Storm]], and Ben Grimm now the Fantastic Four battled against their new, electrified enemy, Dr. Victor Von Doom.

After trapping Doom within his own suit, the team celebrated on the [[Hudson River]] with a large group of civilians and Reed finally worked up the courage to ask Sue to marry him.{{r|Fantastic Four (2005 film)}}

Accustomed to being pulled in different directions, Mr. Fantastic worked to realize his potential as boyfriend to Sue, scientist to humanity, and leader to the Four. As the [[Norrin Radd (Earth-121698)|Silver Surfer]] raced around the globe wreaking havoc, the Fantastic Four unraveled the mystery of the Silver Surfer and confronted the surprising return of their mortal enemy, Dr. Doom.{{r|Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (film)}}

Reed would later be doing research on the Void and would refer to it as a "metaphysical junkyard", Johnny would later be sent to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] presumably by the rogue branch of [[Time Variance Authority (Null-Time Zone)|TVA]] led by [[Paradox (Null-Time Zone)|Mr. Paradox]].{{r|Deadpool & Wolverine}}

| Powers                  = *Seemingly those of his [[Reed Richards (Earth-616)|Earth-616 counterpart]]
| Abilities               = *Genius-level intellect 
| Weaknesses              = *'''Extreme Temperatures:''' If Reed is exposed to extreme cold, he will be unable to move or use his powers, if he is exposed to extreme heat, such as lightning, he will enter a pseudo-melted state, where he is limp and his body will stretch outside of his control.

| Equipment               =

| Notes                   = * {{WP|Ioan Gruffudd}} portrayed Reed Richards in the films {{ml|Fantastic Four (2005 film)}} and {{ml|Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (film)}}.
| Trivia                  = * Unlike his [[Earth-616]] [[Reed Richards (Earth-616)|counterpart]], this [[Glossary:Variants|variant]] of Reed did not start graying at the temples until after the incident that gave him his powers.{{r|Fantastic Four (2005 film)}}
